      <div id="file-allmanga-md-readme" class="Box-body readme blob tmp-p-5 tmp-p-xl-6 gist-border-0" style="overflow: auto" tabindex="0" role="region" aria-label="allmanga.md content, created by minhmc2007 on 02:31PM on March 01.">
    <article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 class="heading-element" dir="auto">AllManga API Technical Specification</h1><a id="user-content-allmanga-api-technical-specification" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: AllManga API Technical Specification" href="#allmanga-api-technical-specification"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This document provides a formal technical specification for the AllManga (AllAnime) interface. It details the GraphQL Persisted Query protocol, asset CDN resolution, and the specific server-side constraints governing image scaling.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">1. Network Architecture</h2><a id="user-content-1-network-architecture" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 1. Network Architecture" href="#1-network-architecture"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The AllManga ecosystem operates across three distinct sub-systems. Communication is strictly governed by header-based validation and origin-matching.</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th align="left">System</th>
<th align="left">Base URL</th>
<th align="left">Purpose</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td align="left"><strong>API Gateway</strong></td>
<td align="left"><code>https://api.allanime.day/api</code></td>
<td align="left">GraphQL metadata and link extraction.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td align="left"><strong>Manga CDN</strong></td>
<td align="left"><code>https://ytimgf.fast4speed.rsvp</code></td>
<td align="left">Serves raw manga page binaries.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td align="left"><strong>Asset CDN</strong></td>
<td align="left"><code>https://wp.youtube-anime.com/aln.youtube-anime.com</code></td>
<td align="left">Serves thumbnails and cover art.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">2. Request Protocol & Header Validation</h2><a id="user-content-2-request-protocol--header-validation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2. Request Protocol & Header Validation" href="#2-request-protocol--header-validation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The API implements a strict <strong>Header Integrity Check</strong>. Requests missing specific browser-level identifiers or containing mismatched origins will result in an empty response (<code>200 OK</code> with null data) or a <code>403 Forbidden</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">2.1 Standard Header Profile</h3><a id="user-content-21-standard-header-profile" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 2.1 Standard Header Profile" href="#21-standard-header-profile"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">For general API and asset requests, the following headers are mandatory:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong><code>User-Agent</code></strong>: Must be a modern Chromium-based string.</li>
<li><strong><code>sec-ch-ua-platform</code></strong>: Recommended value: <code>"Linux"</code> or <code>"Android"</code>.</li>
<li><strong><code>Referer</code></strong>: Must be set to <code>https://allmanga.to/</code> for metadata, or <code>https://youtu-chan.com/</code> for chapter image data.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">3. GraphQL Persisted Queries</h2><a id="user-content-3-graphql-persisted-queries" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3. GraphQL Persisted Queries" href="#3-graphql-persisted-queries"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">AllManga utilizes <strong>Persisted Queries</strong> to reduce payload size and obfuscate database schema. Clients must provide the <code>sha256Hash</code> of the query alongside the variables.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">3.1 Search Protocol</h3><a id="user-content-31-search-protocol" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 3.1 Search Protocol" href="#31-search-protocol"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4. Asset Resolution Logic</h2><a id="user-content-4-asset-resolution-logic" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4. Asset Resolution Logic" href="#4-asset-resolution-logic"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4.1 Manga Page Binaries</h3><a id="user-content-41-manga-page-binaries" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4.1 Manga Page Binaries" href="#41-manga-page-binaries"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Image paths returned in the <code>chapterPages</code> object are relative (e.g., <code>/images133/...</code>).
<strong>Resolution Process:</strong> Prepend the Manga CDN base URL.
<strong>Header Constraint:</strong> Binary downloads <strong>must</strong> include <code>Referer: https://youtu-chan.com/</code>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4.2 Thumbnail & Cover Normalization</h3><a id="user-content-42-thumbnail--cover-normalization" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4.2 Thumbnail & Cover Normalization" href="#42-thumbnail--cover-normalization"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The <code>thumbnail</code> field in search results typically references a specific page frame (e.g., <code>.../016.jpg</code>). To retrieve the primary series cover, the path must be normalized.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Normalization Algorithm:</strong></p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Identify the numeric component of the filename using regex: <code>(\d+)\.(jpg|png|webp)</code>.</li>
<li>Replace the detected integer with <code>001</code> (3-digit zero-padded).</li>
<li>Prepend the <strong>Asset CDN</strong> base URL.</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 class="heading-element" dir="auto">4.3 Whitelisted Scaling Constraints</h3><a id="user-content-43-whitelisted-scaling-constraints" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 4.3 Whitelisted Scaling Constraints" href="#43-whitelisted-scaling-constraints"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The Asset CDN utilizes a server-side whitelist for the width (<code>w</code>) parameter. Non-standard values are ignored or rejected.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong><code>w=250</code></strong>: High-resolution standard (Primary Cover).</li>
<li><strong><code>w=40</code></strong>: Low-resolution icon (Search Result).</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">5. Reference Implementation</h2><a id="user-content-5-reference-implementation" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 5. Reference Implementation" href="#5-reference-implementation"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">requests</span>
<span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">json</span>
<span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">re</span>

<span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-v">AllMangaClient</span>:
    <span class="pl-k">def</span> <span class="pl-en">__init__</span>(<span class="pl-s1">self</span>):
        <span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">api_endpoint</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">"https://api.allanime.day/api"</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">asset_cdn</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s">"https://wp.youtube-anime.com/aln.youtube-anime.com"</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">session</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">requests</span>.<span class="pl-c1">Session</span>()
        <span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">session</span>.<span class="pl-c1">headers</span>.<span class="pl-c1">update</span>({
            <span class="pl-s">'User-Agent'</span>: <span class="pl-s">'Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'</span>,
            <span class="pl-s">'Referer'</span>: <span class="pl-s">'https://allmanga.to/'</span>,
            <span class="pl-s">'sec-ch-ua-platform'</span>: <span class="pl-s">'"Linux"'</span>
        })

    <span class="pl-k">def</span> <span class="pl-en">execute_query</span>(<span class="pl-s1">self</span>, <span class="pl-s1">variables</span>, <span class="pl-s1">query_hash</span>):
        <span class="pl-s1">params</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> {
            <span class="pl-s">'variables'</span>: <span class="pl-s1">json</span>.<span class="pl-c1">dumps</span>(<span class="pl-s1">variables</span>),
            <span class="pl-s">'extensions'</span>: <span class="pl-s1">json</span>.<span class="pl-c1">dumps</span>({<span class="pl-s">"persistedQuery"</span>: {<span class="pl-s">"version"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">1</span>, <span class="pl-s">"sha256Hash"</span>: <span class="pl-s1">query_hash</span>}})
        }
        <span class="pl-s1">response</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">session</span>.<span class="pl-c1">get</span>(<span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">api_endpoint</span>, <span class="pl-s1">params</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">params</span>)
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-s1">response</span>.<span class="pl-c1">json</span>()

    <span class="pl-k">def</span> <span class="pl-en">get_normalized_cover</span>(<span class="pl-s1">self</span>, <span class="pl-s1">raw_path</span>, <span class="pl-s1">width</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">250</span>):
        <span class="pl-s">"""</span>
<span class="pl-s">        Normalizes frame-specific paths to primary cover (001).</span>
<span class="pl-s">        Supports whitelisted widths: 250, 40.</span>
<span class="pl-s">        """</span>
        <span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-c1">not</span> <span class="pl-s1">raw_path</span>: <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-c1">None</span>
        
        <span class="pl-c"># Enforce server-side scaling whitelist</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">target_w</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">width</span> <span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-s1">width</span> <span class="pl-c1">in</span> [<span class="pl-c1">250</span>, <span class="pl-c1">40</span>] <span class="pl-k">else</span> <span class="pl-c1">250</span>
        
        <span class="pl-c"># Regex adjustment to index 001</span>
        <span class="pl-s1">normalized_path</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">re</span>.<span class="pl-c1">sub</span>(<span class="pl-s">r'(\d+)\.(jpg|png|webp)'</span>, <span class="pl-s">r'001.\2'</span>, <span class="pl-s1">raw_path</span>)
        <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-s">f"<span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-s1">self</span>.<span class="pl-c1">asset_cdn</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span>/<span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-s1">normalized_path</span>.<span class="pl-c1">lstrip</span>(<span class="pl-s">'/'</span>)<span class="pl-kos">}</span></span>?w=<span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-s1">target_w</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span>"</span>

<span class="pl-c"># Example Usage:</span>
<span class="pl-c"># client = AllMangaClient()</span>
<span class="pl-c"># search_data = client.execute_query({"search": {"query": "Moon"}}, "2d48...")</span>
<span class="pl-c"># cover_url = client.get_normalized_cover(search_data['data']['mangas']['edges'][0]['thumbnail'])</span></pre></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 class="heading-element" dir="auto">6. Known Error States</h2><a id="user-content-6-known-error-states" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 6. Known Error States" href="#6-known-error-states"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Empty <code>mangas</code> object</strong>: Occurs when the <code>Origin</code> or <code>Referer</code> headers are missing or when the SHA256 hash has been rotated by the provider.</li>
<li><strong>404 on Cover</strong>: Occurs if the normalized <code>001.jpg</code> does not exist on the CDN; implement a fallback to the raw <code>thumbnail</code> path in these instances.</li>
<li><strong>403 on Image Download</strong>: Occurs if the binary request does not include the <code>youtu-chan.com</code> Referer.</li>
</ul>
